title: Good links: 28 January 2024
summary: Old'aVista - Altavista was my first search engine (or should I say altavista+was+my+first+search+engine) and this is a delightful trip down memory lane. Inside .git - Legendary explainer of things Julia Evans has written a fascinating and understandable guide to what lives inside the .git folder. content:
• Old'aVista - Altavista was my first search engine (or should I say altavista+was+my+first+search+engine) and this is a delightful trip down memory lane.
  • Inside .git - Legendary explainer of things Julia Evans has written a fascinating and understandable guide to what lives inside the .git folder.
  • CARI | Aesthetics - I shared this on Mastodon a while back but this is just so compelling, and some of these aesthetics come with a heady dose of nostalgia.
  • Where have all the websites gone? - A heartfelt lamentation for the human web.
  • Oh Hello Ana - Ana Rodrigues has posted a very comprehensive list of good tech and web-related links.
